attributes.action: Restore the five-year Indefinite Leave to Remain(ILR)pathway for migrant workers
attributes.additional_details: We came to the UK to contribute, not to be trapped in uncertainty, We worked through challenging conditions, supported communities, and built our lives around a promise that has now been changed. We ask the Government to act with fairness, integrity, and humanity by restoring a clear and achievable pathway to settlement and ensuring that those who care for others are treated with dignity.
attributes.background: Reinstate the five-year pathway to Indefinite Leave to Remain (ILR) for healthcare and care workers Ensure immigration rule changes do not apply retrospectively to those already in the UK

rejection.details: Keep 5-year ILR for Health and Care visa holders to protect the NHS: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/745684
